testcase.name: tc08_firstInternshipLinkNavigation

failure.message: Internship link click did not navigate. did not expect [https://www.vellinfotech.com/internship] but found [https://www.vellinfotech.com/internship]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Internship link click did not navigate. did not expect [https://www.vellinfotech.com/internship] but found [https://www.vellinfotech.com/internship] at testcase.name: tc13_emptyFormValidation

failure.message: Empty form submit did not show validation. expected [true] but found [false]
